testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention Duplicate detection logic Should identify duplicate issues with same ID label
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention Duplicate detection logic Should identify duplicate issues with same ID label

testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention Duplicate detection logic Should keep oldest issue and mark newer ones as duplicates
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention Duplicate detection logic Should keep oldest issue and mark newer ones as duplicates

testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention Duplicate detection logic Should skip closed issues when checking for duplicates
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention Duplicate detection logic Should skip closed issues when checking for duplicates

testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention Duplicate detection logic Should handle multiple duplicate sets
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention Duplicate detection logic Should handle multiple duplicate sets

testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention API optimization Should use per_page parameter for efficiency
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention API optimization Should use per_page parameter for efficiency

testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention API optimization Should check for existing issues when label exists
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention API optimization Should check for existing issues when label exists

testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention API optimization Should not check for existing issues when label is new
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention API optimization Should not check for existing issues when label is new

testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention Error handling Should have proper error message for duplicate check failure
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention Error handling Should have proper error message for duplicate check failure

testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention Error handling Should distinguish between label creation errors
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention Error handling Should distinguish between label creation errors

testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention Deduplication sorting Should correctly sort issues by creation date
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention Deduplication sorting Should correctly sort issues by creation date

testcase.classname: Duplicate Issue Prevention Deduplication sorting Should handle issues with same timestamp
testcase.name: Duplicate Issue Prevention Deduplication sorting Should handle issues with same timestamp

testcase.classname: Unplanned Issues Filtering Issue Filtering Logic Should filter out issues closed as not_planned
testcase.name: Unplanned Issues Filtering Issue Filtering Logic Should filter out issues closed as not_planned

testcase.classname: Unplanned Issues Filtering Issue Filtering Logic Should keep open issues regardless of state_reason
testcase.name: Unplanned Issues Filtering Issue Filtering Logic Should keep open issues regardless of state_reason

testcase.classname: Unplanned Issues Filtering Issue Filtering Logic Should keep closed issues with other state_reasons
testcase.name: Unplanned Issues Filtering Issue Filtering Logic Should keep closed issues with other state_reasons

testcase.classname: Unplanned Issues Filtering GitHubIssueWithStateReason interface Should accept valid state_reason values
testcase.name: Unplanned Issues Filtering GitHubIssueWithStateReason interface Should accept valid state_reason values

testcase.classname: Unplanned Issues Filtering GitHubIssueWithStateReason interface Should properly extend GitHubIssue
testcase.name: Unplanned Issues Filtering GitHubIssueWithStateReason interface Should properly extend GitHubIssue

testcase.classname: Unplanned Issues Filtering Filtering logic validation Should correctly identify unplanned issues
testcase.name: Unplanned Issues Filtering Filtering logic validation Should correctly identify unplanned issues

testcase.classname: Unplanned Issues Filtering Filtering logic validation Should handle mixed issue states correctly
testcase.name: Unplanned Issues Filtering Filtering logic validation Should handle mixed issue states correctly

testcase.name: Twitter Sync assigned -> delete assigned issues are excluded and mapped tweets are deleted

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory checkIfForkedRepo
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory checkIfForkedRepo

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory updates issue title in devpool when project issue title changes
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory updates issue title in devpool when project issue title changes

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory updates issue labels in devpool when project issue labels change
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory updates issue labels in devpool when project issue labels change

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory updates issue body in devpool when project issue url changes
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory updates issue body in devpool when project issue url changes

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory does not update issue when no metadata changes are detected
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory does not update issue when no metadata changes are detected

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory keeps devpool issue state unchanged when project issue state is open and devpool issue state is open
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory keeps devpool issue state unchanged when project issue state is open and devpool issue state is open

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory keeps devpool issue state unchanged when project issue state is closed and devpool issue state is closed
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory keeps devpool issue state unchanged when project issue state is closed and devpool issue state is closed

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory closes devpool issue when project issue is closed
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory closes devpool issue when project issue is closed

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory reopens devpool issue when project issue is reopened
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory reopens devpool issue when project issue is reopened

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory adds Unavailable label to devpool issue when project issue is assigned and open
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory adds Unavailable label to devpool issue when project issue is assigned and open

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory removes Unavailable label from devpool issue when project issue is closed
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory removes Unavailable label from devpool issue when project issue is closed

testcase.classname: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory removes Unavailable label from devpool issue when project issue is unassigned and reopened
testcase.name: handleDevPoolIssue Devpool directory removes Unavailable label from devpool issue when project issue is unassigned and reopened

testcase.classname: createDevPoolIssue (integration) Devpool directory only creates a new devpool issue if it's unassigned, opened and not already a devpool issue
testcase.name: createDevPoolIssue (integration) Devpool directory only creates a new devpool issue if it's unassigned, opened and not already a devpool issue

testcase.classname: createDevPoolIssue (integration) Devpool directory does not create a new devpool issue if it's already a devpool issue
testcase.name: createDevPoolIssue (integration) Devpool directory does not create a new devpool issue if it's already a devpool issue

testcase.classname: createDevPoolIssue (integration) Devpool directory does not create a new devpool issue if it's closed
testcase.name: createDevPoolIssue (integration) Devpool directory does not create a new devpool issue if it's closed

testcase.classname: calculateStatistics calculates statistics correctly for empty issues array
testcase.name: calculateStatistics calculates statistics correctly for empty issues array

testcase.classname: calculateStatistics calculates statistics correctly for issues with different labels and states
testcase.name: calculateStatistics calculates statistics correctly for issues with different labels and states

testcase.classname: calculateStatistics ignores invalid pricing labels and logs an error
testcase.name: calculateStatistics ignores invalid pricing labels and logs an error
